items.title: Office Depot/Max Stores: Buy $300 In Visa Giftcards & Get $15 Instant Discount (5/17 – 5/23)
items.title_en: Office Depot/Max Stores: Buy $300 In Visa Giftcards & Get $15 Instant Discount (5/17 – 5/23)

items.summary_zh: 在 5/17 至 5/23 期間，於 Office Depot/Max 門市購買 $300 Visa 禮卡可享 $15 即時折扣。
items.title_zh-cn: Office Depot/Max 商店：购买300美元Visa礼品卡即获15美元即时折扣（5/17-5/23）
items.summary_zh-cn: 在Office Depot/Max商店，购买价值300美元的Visa礼品卡即可在5月17日至5月23日期间享受15美元的即时折扣。
items.title_es: Office Depot/Max Stores: Compra $300 en tarjetas de regalo Visa y obtén $15 de descuento instantáneo (5/17 – 5/23)
items.summary_es: Office Depot y Max Stores otorgan un descuento inmediato de $15 al comprar $300 en tarjetas de regalo Visa.

items.title: [Reminder To Change] Rakuten Cashback Can Now Be Earned As Bilt Points (Also, Limited-Time 1:1 Conversion)
items.title_en: [Reminder To Change] Rakuten Cashback Can Now Be Earned As Bilt Points (Also, Limited-Time 1:1 Conversion)

items.summary_zh: Rakuten 現金回饋現可轉換為 Bilt 點數，且限時提供 1:1 兌換比率。
items.title_zh-cn: 【提醒】Rakuten 返现已可兑换为Bilt积分（限时1:1转换）

items.summary_es: Rakuten permite ahora acumular reembolsos como puntos Bilt, con una oferta temporal de conversión uno a uno.

items.title: [Targeted] AmEx Offer: AMC+ Spend $7.99+ Get $7.99 back (Limit 3)

items.title: Homes & Villas By Marriott: Stay Two Nights (Minimum $2,000) & Earn 40,000 Bonus Points
